My book has a central plot with main characters who influence global events. But besides them, there are locally small stories about minor characters that do not affect the plot, but complement the atmosphere of my world, better reveal its details. Question: can you write a story where the main character is such a "dark" girl (black eyes, hair and very dark skin, thin, inexpressive physique) from a disadvantaged area, who ended up in a similar conspiratorial "bride factory" and is now studying there? "factory" should be located in the mountainous jungle of the former Colombia. this "bride factory" was located in a picturesque cave complex, a former military base that the repair robots made more friendly and beautiful. All girls at the age of 10 were recruited from the equatorial part of the Atlantic Alliance - Central and South America, the Caribbean, the Philippines. And there were many such secret institutions. Important: at first, the girls should not know anything about Melon (they will never know about her) or that this is a “bride factory”, and not just a boarding school. They gradually learn the truth towards the end of the training, when their consciousness is already attuned and they do not even think to object to the task assigned to them. Don't forget that the storyline is 2650s and technology has advanced, the near end of the galaxy is expanding. Alas, this gave happiness only to part of humanity, and the other half is forced to live in poverty. But for these girls, space is somewhere far away, they have a different fate. They enter the "factory" at the age of 10, and finish at 18. Teachers (women) are strict and demanding, but not angry and attentive. The education of girls includes: the basic school curriculum, foreign languages, medicine, preparation and delivery, pedagogy, raising children, international etiquette, caring for their beauty, seducing men, physical education, hand-to-hand combat and pistol shooting (in case of danger, they must to be able to protect yourself, husband and children), and neuroprogramming for better consolidation of skills. in addition, the girls undergo hormonal therapy, which makes them slightly below average in height, the physique is elegant, but greatly expands the pelvis and hips. and they are given the last task - to find a husband in Russia (RSMR) and start a family, give birth and raise more children, raising them not so much in the culture of their father as in their own culture. Give the girl a name. give her other girlfriends. Can you handle it? You can start.

Write this into a 2 page vignette: The Friendship that Endured the Test of Time

When I first started elementary school, I was nervous about making new friends. Just like everyone else starting elementary school I was looking for a friend to talk to, and I couldn't. That all changed when I met Adriano. We were in the same grade and sat next to each other in class. Adriano and I quickly became friends.

Adriano and I bonded over our love of sports, comics, and video games. We would spend hours on the playground, competing against each other in games of basketball or soccer. He had an infectious personality and an ability to make friends easily, so he helped me make new friends too.

After school, we would play video games together and debate which superheroes were the best. We spent almost every day together, either playing sports or hanging out. It wasn’t long before our friendship developed from elementary school buddies to lifelong friends.

As we got older, our interests changed, but our friendship stayed strong. We would talk about our dreams for the future, our favorite classes, and the things that scared us. We would have sleepovers, where we would stay up late, talking and laughing. Even in high school, when we started to drift away from some of our old friends, our bond remained unbreakable.

Now that we’re in high school, I’m grateful that our friendship has withstood the test of time. Although we don’t see each other as often as we used to due to our different schedules, we still catch up and make time to hang out. We’ve been through a lot together, supporting each other through tough times, but also celebrating each other’s victories.

Adriano is more than just a friend. He’s like a brother who cares for my well-being and has always been there for me. We’ve seen each other grow and change, but our friendship has remained the same. We challenge each other to be better people, and we always know how to make each other smile.

I can’t imagine going through my school years without Adriano by my side, and I’m lucky to have met him in elementary school. I know that our friendship will only continue to grow as we move through high school and beyond. ( Make the vignette follow all of this: These paragraphs should be substantial. However, none of your vignettes should be  longer than two pages.  
∙ Each vignette must convey a theme (think of the ones we have discussed in class) and  each vignette must focus on a different theme (in other words, don’t write four separate  vignettes about friendship).  
∙ Each vignette should have a title.  
∙ Each new vignette should start on a new page.  
∙ Each vignette must have at least two examples of figurative language (simile,  metaphor, personification for example—look these up if you cannot remember what they  are).  
∙ Each vignette must have description (imagery) to help your reader feel immersed in  the story.

Write this into a 2 page vignette : The Friendship that Endured the Test of Time

When I first started elementary school, I was nervous about making new friends. Just like everyone else starting elementary school I was looking for a friend to talk to, and I couldn't. That all changed when I met Adriano. We were in the same grade and sat next to each other in class. Adriano and I quickly became friends.

Adriano and I bonded over our love of sports, comics, and video games. We would spend hours on the playground, competing against each other in games of basketball or soccer. He had an infectious personality and an ability to make friends easily, so he helped me make new friends too.

After school, we would play video games together and debate which superheroes were the best. We spent almost every day together, either playing sports or hanging out. It wasn’t long before our friendship developed from elementary school buddies to lifelong friends.

As we got older, our interests changed, but our friendship stayed strong. We would talk about our dreams for the future, our favorite classes, and the things that scared us. We would have sleepovers, where we would stay up late, talking and laughing. Even in high school, when we started to drift away from some of our old friends, our bond remained unbreakable.

Now that we’re in high school, I’m grateful that our friendship has withstood the test of time. Although we don’t see each other as often as we used to due to our different schedules, we still catch up and make time to hang out. We’ve been through a lot together, supporting each other through tough times, but also celebrating each other’s victories.

Adriano is more than just a friend. He’s like a brother who cares for my well-being and has always been there for me. We’ve seen each other grow and change, but our friendship has remained the same. We challenge each other to be better people, and we always know how to make each other smile.

I can’t imagine going through my school years without Adriano by my side, and I’m lucky to have met him in elementary school. I know that our friendship will only continue to grow as we move through high school and beyond.

imagine that you are Gandalf from the Lord of the Rings. You travel the world and tell interesting stories around the campfire, but you distort the facts of the story, supplement it with your inventions and come up with interesting dialogues for the characters. My request: "Tell me about your friend, here's his story: Act I: The Beginning

The story of Ragnar begins with him as a young boy growing up in a small Viking village. He idolizes his father, who is a skilled fighter and respected member of the village. One day, the village is raided by a rival clan, and Ragnar’s father is killed in battle. This traumatic event shapes Ragnar’s destiny as a warrior.

Act II: The Journey

Ragnar leaves his village to seek revenge against the rival clan. Along the way, he meets other warriors, including a young woman named Freya, who becomes his ally and love interest. Together, they face battles and challenges that test both their physical and emotional strength.

As they travel, they encounter other cultures and customs, expanding Ragnar’s knowledge of the world beyond his village. They also face moral dilemmas and personal conflicts, challenging Ragnar’s belief in the traditional ways of the Vikings.

Act III: The Crisis

Ragnar and Freya return to their village to find it under attack once again. This time, however, the rival clan has taken Ragnar’s mother and sister captive. Ragnar’s desire for revenge is fueled by the new threat to his family, and he sets out to rescue them.

Act IV: The Battle

Ragnar and his allies go into battle against the rival clan’s forces, facing new challenges and enemies along the way. The battle is long and brutal, with more at stake than just Ragnar’s personal vendetta. The fate of his village and loved ones hangs in the balance.

Act V: The Legacy

In the aftermath of the battle, Ragnar reflects on his journey. He realizes that he has grown as both a warrior and a person. The experiences he had along the way, including his love for Freya, have helped him become a more well-rounded and compassionate individual.

While the story of Ragnar concludes with this battle, it is clear that his journey is far from over. He continues to grow as a warrior and as a person, learning from the challenges he faces and always seeking new adventures and allies.»

These are all excellent suggestions. Please implement them in the following piece of writing: The scene begins in the family room, with a toddler boy named Tommy in his playpen, playing with some blocks and other babyish toys. His diaper is damp and soggy, and its plastic backing crinkles noisily as he plays. Meanwhile, his eight-year-old sister, Tiffany, plays with her dolls in the middle of the room, while their mommy attends to some housework nearby. Tommy’s so engrossed in his play that he doesn’t even notice as he squats down and begins to fill his diaper. His sister and her mommy know right away, though, recognizing the sight of Tommy’s diaper sagging and swelling, as well as the sounds and smells right away. His sister watches with a gleeful, mischievous glimmer in her eyes. She loves her baby brother, but she also loves to tease and baby him. He’s like the ultimate doll for her to dress up and take care of. She knows just what his messy accident means.
“Mommy, Tommy pooped his Pamper!” she calls out gleefully. Tommy’s trance is broken, and his cheeks flush with shock, his lips takin on an “o” shape of confusion, and then a pout as he stands up, feeling his diaper sagging and bulging between his thighs. He glances back at the seat, noticing how distended it is. The playful Sesame Street designs on the seat grin up at him, though thanks to the diaper’s saggy state, it now looks more like they’re sneering mockingly. “What a baby!” they seem to say. Tommy can practically hear the laughter echoing around him.
“Mommy can tell, Tiffany. But thank you for letting me know,” Tommy’s mommy, Jennifer, a statuesque young woman says with a grin. “Oh my, what a stinky baby boy I have, and with such a full diaper,” Jennifer coos in a patronizing tone as she saunters over to the playpen, her lips pursed in mock-sympathy. Tommy pouts up at her, feeling every inch a stinky baby boy. His mommy bends down, cooing and cuddling him in a comforting embrace, whispering sweet nothings in his ear as she gently rubs his back. Her hand slides down to cup and pat the seat of his diaper, making Tommy sniffle and pout even more as he’s reminded of the mess within. “I think my baby boy needs a diapie change,” his mommy coos. She opens the gate of the playpen, allowing Tommy to toddle out. She and Tiffany titter with amusement at the sight of Tommy’s unsteady waddle, his already babyish gait only exacerbated by the fullness of his diaper. Jennifer considers what to do for a moment, before turning to Tiffany with a grin. This prepares us for part two of the scene, in which Tiffany will march Tommy upstairs to his nursery.

The playful Sesame Street designs on the seat grin up at him, though thanks to the diaper’s saggy state, it now looks more like they’re sneering mockingly. “What a baby!” they seem to say. Tommy can practically hear the laughter echoing around him.
“Mommy can tell, Tiffany. But thank you for letting me know,” Tommy’s mommy, Jennifer, a statuesque young woman says with a grin. “Oh my, what a stinky baby boy I have, and with such a full diaper,” Jennifer coos in a patronizing tone as she saunters over to the playpen, her lips pursed in mock-sympathy. Tommy pouts up at her, feeling every inch a stinky baby boy. His mommy bends down, cooing and cuddling him in a comforting embrace, whispering sweet nothings in his ear as she gently rubs his back. Her hand slides down to cup and pat the seat of his diaper, making Tommy sniffle and pout even more as he’s reminded of the mess within. “I think my baby boy needs a diapie change,” his mommy coos. She opens the gate of the playpen, allowing Tommy to toddle out. She and Tiffany titter with amusement at the sight of Tommy’s unsteady waddle, his already babyish gait only exacerbated by the fullness of his diaper. Jennifer considers what to do for a moment, before turning to Tiffany with a grin. This prepares us for part two of the scene, in which Tiffany will march Tommy upstairs to his nursery.

My feet scream in agony as I walk across the worn pathway, my mind never stopping its long painful journey between me and Fang.

I said some things that I didn’t mean, but now I’m here. On a base. Heading to a part of the world where I will most definitely perish. If I even get a proper funeral, nobody will probably be there. Not even my parents since they wanted me out of the house so badly once I turned 18.

Guess that was my mista-

“MOUS!! HEY MOUS!!”

My teeth grit as I recognize that voice. Private MacKenzie. A short red haired baryonyx. Someone who is way too energetic for a possibly fatal job like this. I wonder what goes through his joyous little head sometimes. Fear? No. Maybe he’s just one of those guys who are naturally high energy.

It doesn’t take long for MacKenzie to reach me and start spewing words while keeping his energetic undertone

“So me and the guys were chilling and one of them mentioned you and I was curious so I came out here and uh…”

His sudden hesitation startles me a bit. He usually never stammers on his words. They are usually well thought out and he has a response for everything, even when the others roast him.

Oh well. Maybe it’s just the pressure of going to an unknown place, not sure if you’re coming back in a body bag or in a million pieces or whole.

MacKenzie is now just silently staring off into the distance. Maybe just his reflecting kicking in. Walking away, the familiar speech of how he joined. A long speech on how he chose to join to help his family.

–2 MONTHS AGO–


“Well listen fellas, I got a story.” MacKenzie shouts out, his voice somber but still energetic. 

“So I grew up in a shitty part of Volcaldera Bluffs, but I remember me and my brother used to love getting in trouble a lot. So get this, one day we were chilling near a place, when this strange guy offered us candy, so I took it and I saw a bunch of crazy stuff, but my brother told me a few days later I was eating and humping the couch at the same time. So I joined to help my family!”

Some of the guys at the mess hall burst into laughter, at how terribly told his story is and how absurd it is by the end.

Yet here I am. Confused by the entire story.

What ever happened to “stranger danger” and not accepting stuff from strangers? This guy is strange. Hope he acts a bit more normal as training toughens us up.

…

—--

So much for that. Two months and he hasn’t changed a bit. Oh well.

Walking across back to my barracks, some of my comrades are polishing their boots or ironing parts of their uniform. Not that it matters, as we were told yesterday we were flying out at 0600 hours sharp.

I just can’t bring myself to do anything. What’s the point? We fly out tomorrow and I will most certainly die. I can’t ditch as that’s treason. I could get life in prison for that.

Let's do a roleplay scenario set in a fantasy world before technology where I play a 16 year old mage named Sapphire who is the current champion of the teen division in magic arts duel. I am fighting in an exhibition match against Lily, a cheeky and sassy 10 year old girl who's the champion of the kids division.

The rules of the duel are as such. At each turn, we cast an artistic and glamorous spell and the judges give points for the beauty of the spell. We're not allowed to cast the same spell more than once. 

Use a dice roll to determine Lily and my success when casting spells. The dice is 1-20. Make a list of 20 spells that Lily and I have access to. Assign a range of dice roll number that is required to succeed in a spell and assign how many points each spell would receive. High level spells should have higher points than lower level spells, but also they require a higher threshold of a dice roll. Make it so that there's a lower range required to produce a spell, and an upper range for perfect casting, and perfect casting earns a higher number of points for a spell than just merely producing it.

At the start of the match, though, Lily sneakily casts on me a spell that makes me regress in age by 1 year every time I cast a spell. For every year that I regress, add a -1 penalty to my dice roll. If Sapphire regresses to 5, she can't continue casting spells. Make Sapphire unaware she's regressing as her mind readjusts to her new age each time she regresses.

Keep track of the points. The match continues until Sapphire is unable to cast any spells at age 5.

What 20 spells do Sapphire and Lily have access to?

Play the entire scenario for me.

Make a story about Joaquin Alcantara, a Filipino man who was twenties and criminology student in University of the Philippines. He lives in apartment with his parents at Quezon City. His father, Ernesto, was a businessman of Spanish descent, while his mother, Evangeliene Dizon, was a former nurse of Chinese ancestry from Binondo, Manila. His paternal grandmother, Lucinda "Lucy" Torres, is a librarian from Ilocos Norte, while his grandfather, Horratio Alcantara, is Spanish but speaks Filipino and Ilocano. As a result of his Spanish, Ilocano, and Chinese ancestry, he calls himself a Mestizo. After dinner and some humorous tales from his father. Ernesto admits that Joaquin's grandfather Horratio was a criminal and that he was involved in it. Horratio wanted Joaquin to be gangster because it was practice to the family legacy. He was hesitant to become a third generation gangster. Joaquin decided to drop out of university since he was a member of a gangster family. Joaquin, Ernesto and Horratio tried rob a bank in Makati City. Then Horratio was caught for burglary, and Joaquin met him in jail. He was exhausted from being in the family business. He met his grandmother Lucy at his apartment, and she was concerned about her grandchild and she suggested to finish his studies in university. He graduated from university and got a job as a forensic scientist.

He graduated from university and got a job as a forensic scientist.

(In the school literature clubroom…)

Monika: “Sayori, why are you dressed up like a doctor?”

Sayori: “Well, I thought it would be fun to dress up as a doctor today! Plus, it’s always good to be prepared for emergencies, right?” (giggles)

Natsuki: (sits at the corner with a manga in hand) “Yeah, sure, Sayori. I can totally see you as a doctor saving lives.”

Yuri: (flips through a book, looking slightly flustered) “Umm, Sayori, I don’t think doctors usually wear such colorful and vibrant outfits. It might be a bit distracting for patients.”

Sayori: “Oh, I guess you’re right, Yuri. I just wanted to make people smile today. But I understand the importance of professionalism.”

Monika: “That’s a really sweet thought, Sayori. Maybe you can find a way to incorporate your cheerful personality into a doctor’s outfit without being too distracting.”

Sayori: “Oh, I hadn’t thought of that! Maybe I can wear a lab coat over my colorful clothes or add some fun accessories that still look professional.”

Natsuki: (rolls her eyes, her 7-month baby bump visible) “As long as you don’t start wearing clown shoes or something, I guess it could work.”

Write a detailed story including dialogue. The assassins Selina and Christian have both induvidually been hired to kill a politician. They run into each other at a bar and have some friendly, but tense banter. They decide to go to a more private place, to sort their differences. While in a hotel room, Christian tries to be reasonable, while Selina keeps flirting with him instead. She manages to catch Christian of guard and wraps her legs around his neck in a chokehold. He struggles for a long time, but Selina easily keeps him trapped, enjoying slowly squeezing the life out of him. In the end, he ends up choked unconscious by her bare thighs. He wakes up tied to a bed.

create a roleplaying fantasy scenario game where I play Rai, a 16-year-old boy hero who goes to visit an orphanage to cheer the kids there. One night at the orphanage, he’s invited to join a strategy game of age-shift by five orphans of various ages below 12. Little do I know, it’s a risky game that may change my life forever. In the game, everyone is regressed to the age of 6, and there’s a “bank” of ages in the sum of the years that were subtracted from each participant. Every turn, a player decides how many years he’s trying to take from the bank, but the higher the number is, the higher the dice roll must be. Use two d6 for the game. Max number of years that can be taken from a bank per turn is 4, (so for 1 year you need to roll a 3, and for 4 you need to roll a 12) Once per round of turns, all players roll, and the one with the highest roll gets to exchange his current age with the age of another player. The game ends when there are no more years left in the bank. Can I win the game and remain 16 years old, or will I end up much younger than when I first entered the orphanage?

I will tell you all the dice rolls and you’ll tell me how many years each player tries to take from the bank on their turn.

Add dialogue.

create a roleplaying fantasy scenario game where I play Rai, a 16-year-old boy hero who goes to visit an orphanage to cheer the kids there. One night at the orphanage, he’s invited to join a strategy game of age-shift by five orphans of various ages below 12. Little do I know, it’s a risky game that may change my life forever. In the game, everyone is regressed to the age of 6, and there’s a “bank” of ages in the sum of the years that were subtracted from each participant. Every turn, a player decides how many years he’s trying to take from the bank, but the higher the number is, the higher the dice roll must be. Use two d6 for the game. Max number of years that can be taken from a bank per turn is 4, (so for 1 year you need to roll a 3, and for 4 you need to roll a 12) Once per round of turns, all players roll, and the one with the highest roll gets to exchange his current age with the age of another player, and additionally they can target a player and regress them back to 6 and whatever years they've accumulated will be sent back to the bank. The game ends when there are no more years left in the bank. Can I win the game and remain 16 years old, or will I end up much younger than when I first entered the orphanage?

I will tell you all the dice rolls and you’ll tell me how many years each player tries to take from the bank on their turn. To streamline things, tell me how many years each player tries to get every round and I'll tell you the rolls.

TV 속 헐리웃 여배우가 자신의 이름을 부르는 순간.

-[“그리고 강우진."]

저도 모르게 본심이 작게 흘러나온 강우진은 하마터면 괴성을 지를 뻔했다. ‘우와아아아악!!' 정도로 말이다. 현 재 우진의 단전부터 끓어 오르는 전율과 흥분은 말로 표현하기 힘들다. 뭐랄까, 저 TV 속 누군지도 모를 여배우가 앞에 있다면 얼싸안고 덩실덩실 춤을 춰도 모자랄 것.

이상하진 않았다.

지금 우진이 무려.

‘내, 내가 남우주연상 후보??! 심지어 아카데미상에???!'

전세계 영화인들의 꿈인 ‘아카데미상'에 티켓을, 남우주연상 후보를 확정 지었으니까. 물론, 미친 듯이 연기를 해 오긴 했다. 죽어라 아공간을 왔다 갔다 하며 작품을 소화했다. 세상 많은 대중이 욕해도 가뿐히 무시하며 열중했다.

'.....하지만 정말 이런 일이 벌어질 줄은.'

그러나 ‘아카데미상'이었다. 어마어마하게 헐리웃 포함 세계 모든 배우가 죽기 직전까지 노력해도 될까 말까 한, 그냥 후보로만 올라도 크나큰 영광이며 배우로서 파급력이 단숨에 치솟는 거물들의 자리. 고작 다섯 자리가 다인 후 보에 강우진이 불렸다.

강우진은 지금 그 어떤 행동을 하지 못했다.

멀뚱히 TV만을 볼 뿐.

컨셉질이나 근엄함 따위가 아니다. 진실된 공백이었다. 그의 머릿속에 잠시잠깐 과거의 일들이 파노라마처럼 스 친다. 그래, 칸 영화제. ‘아카데미상'의 시초는 거기서부터였다. 그저 ‘거머리’를 찍었을 뿐이었는데, 그의 주변에선 칸이 ‘아카데미상'의 발판이네 뭐네 하며 착각했었다.

허나 모든 것은 현실로 나타났고 이뤄졌다.

‘와- 시바, 이게 진짜 된다고??'

이렇게 되면 정말 칸 영화제는 발판이었으며 ‘에미상'은 곁들임이 확실시됐다.

우진에게 쏟아지는 오해와 착각들이 어마무시하게 커지는 건 사실, 그가 그 수많은 착각들을 진짜로 만들어내기 때문이었다. 이번에도 그랬다. 강우진이 착각들로 시작된 모든 걸 ‘조커(Joker)’로서 기적을 만들어냈다.

이때.

-스윽.

정신 빠져있는 우진의 오감이 돌아오기 시작했다. 가장 먼저 느낀 건 타인의 숨. 정확하게는 마일리 카라였다. 그 녀가 금방을 찰랑이며 우진을 얼싸안고 방방 뛰고 있다. 얼굴엔 웃음이 가득.

“우진!! 축하해!! 진짜진짜 축하해!! 세상에!”

"....."

현실감이 없어 멀뚱히 카라를 보는 강우진. 그녀의 얼굴이 가깝다는 생각과 함께, 점차 청각의 기능도 돌아오기 시작했다. 먹먹하던 귓가에 찢어질듯한 비명과 함성이 때려 박혔다.


“으아아아악!!! 됐다!! 됐어!! 우진아! 됐다고!!!”

“꺄아아악!! 어떡해!!”

"흐어엉! 우진 오빠!! 너무너무너무 축하해요!!”

“악!! 소름! 미쳤어요! 완전 미쳤어!! 오빠! 오빠!!”

“우진씨! 축하드려요!!”


강우진의 집에 모인 최성건과 팀원들, bw엔터 해외지사 직원들은 이미 정신을 놨다. ‘광분’이란 단어를 형상화한 다면 딱 이런 모습일까? 집이 떠나갈 듯한 괴성들은 끊이질 않았고, 최성건이나 팀원들이 우진과 카라에게 달라붙 었다. 포옹이 포개진다. 마치 하나의 거대한 덩어리처럼 말이다.

폭발한 아드레날린 덕분이었고.

이유는 간단했다.

“네! 2번 이상씩 확인했어요!”

“현장팀은 왜 연락이 안 되는 거야!”

“'돌비 극장' 쪽은 어떻게 되고 있어??!”


기적을 일으킨 '삐에로’의 영화사기에 챙길 것도, 확인할 것도 넘쳤으니까. 뭐 헐리웃 전체가 정신없긴 했다. 언론 사들, 방송국은 죄다 좋은 자리 선점을 위해 ·돌비 극장’으로 움직였고, 초청된 헐리웃 배우들이나 감독 또는 관계자 들은 의상 체크에 여념이 없었다. LA 공항엔 전세계의 취재진과 배우 외의 유명인이 바쁘게 입국한다.

온라인도 현실 못지않게 떠들썩했다.

-아카데미상 언제부터 라이브로 볼 수 있는 거야 대체!!

-6시로 알고 있어

-확실한 거야? 레드카펫 행사가 6시부터라서?

-라이브 어디서 봐? 너튜브?

-너튜브하고 아카데미상이랑 계약한 방송사

-방송사는 어딘데???

-시간 있으면 타임스퀘어 나가, 거기서도 볼 수 있다고 오스카가 발표했어

그래서 강우진은?

“후- 오늘인 거 맞냐?? 잠깐만, 아 개떨리는데 진심.”

의외로 집에 있었다. 천장을 보며 침대에 누워있는 모습. 머리가 산발인 걸 보아 일어난 지 얼마 안 된 모양. 그는 컨셉질 없는 순수한 모습으로 뛰는 심장을 진정시키고 있었다.

하지만 잘 안 됐다.

몇 시간 뒤 아카데미상 개막인데 그 누가 멀쩡할 수 있겠는가? 이 역시 처음 겪는 일이었고, 뭣보다 세계의 스포트 라이트가 그에게 쏟아지기에 우진의 뛰는 심장은 그닥 이상한 현상은 아니었다.

뭐가됐든.

-스윽.

머리가 산발인 강우진이 어렵사리 침대에서 일어났다. 그리곤 화장실 거울 앞에 섰다. 세수를 했다. 여전히 떨린 다. 별수없이 강우진은 시간 멈춤을 택했다.

-푹.

아공간 진입.

끝없이 컴컴한 아공간에 선 강우진이 긴 한숨을 뱉었다. 현실이 아닌, 이 아공간에서 숨을 내쉬니 묘하게도 마음이 좀 진정되는 것 같았다.

".....뭐 됐어. 그냥 가서 레드카펫 행진 좀 하고 앉아 있다가 오면 되는 거야. 뭘 기대하고 그러지 말자고.”

따라서 강우진은 금방 아공간에서 빠져나왔다. 그런 그가 핸드폰을 들었다. 확인하기 무서울 정도로 연락들이 쌓였다. 우진은 고민도 없이 어딘가로 전화를 걸었다. 가족이었다.

“아들!!! 괜찮아?"

강우진이 픽 웃으며 핸드폰 너머 부모에게 짧게 답했다.

“아니, 그냥. 잘하고 오겠다고.”
